docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,900.55 FILED BY SAUREL, GABRIELA AS TO DEFENDANT MOENTER, AVA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAUREL, GABRIELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOENTER, AVA $1,900.55 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,980.55, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED MAR-06-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOENTER, AVA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-13-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-13-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ALAN SILVERMAN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
